name: cvpr-paper-writing-skill
description: Codex plugin for writing top-conference papers in official LaTeX templates with Overleaf, experiment, integrity, and reviewer-risk checks.

interface.shortDescription: Write and format top-conference papers in official LaTeX templates.
interface.longDescription: A Codex skill/plugin for top-conference paper writing: official template setup, main.tex plus paper.tex workflow, Overleaf formatting, claim/evidence/experiment traceability, integrity gates, multi-perspective review, and submission checks.
defaultPrompt: Set up an official CVPR LaTeX paper project.
Review this top-conference paper for claim gaps.
Draft a top-conference introduction in paper.tex.
